# CGImageMetadataGetTypeID()

**Function**

Returns the type identifier for metadata objects.

## Declaration

```swift
func CGImageMetadataGetTypeID() -> CFTypeID
```

## Return Value

The type identifier for [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/CGImageMetadata] and [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/CGMutableImageMetadata] objects.
